title: Raising $750K and founding a company @ Hardware SaaS Startup (Sahara Cloud)

blocks.text: Project Overview

Sahara Cloud is a we-based platform that enables users to build, test, and debug hardware in the cloud through virtual simulations and remote hardware access. Traditional design tools are outdated, inefficient, and cost companies millions in wasted R&D. Sahara Cloud solves this by allowing teams to run hardware and software tests on the same system, reducing development costs and time-to-market.
Problem (The Challenge)

Outdated hardware design tools force engineers to use makeshift scripts to adapt automation tools, causing inefficiencies, costly mistakes, and delays. $580B+ is spent globally on solving hardware design challenges due to:
Lack of integration between software, firmware, and hardware testing.
Limited access to hardware tools, requiring high CapEx investments.
Time-consuming debugging processes that slow down R&D.
Solution & Execution (My Role & Impact)
As Co-Founder & Chief Product Officer, I led 0→1 product development, customer discovery, and fundraising, driving Sahara Cloud from conception to launch.
✅ Product Strategy & Market Fit:
Conducted user research & interviews to identify pain points.
Developed an AI-powered cloud la for remote debugging, unit testing, and hardware simulation.
Launched MVP with 200 Beta Users, 3 Universities, and 1 Enterprise Client.
✅ Growth & Go-To-Market Strategy:
A/B testing & analytics to optimize conversion, increasing sign-up rates by 50%.
Drove 30% prospect-to-demo rate through effective marketing and product positioning.
Built strategic partnerships with academic institutions & enterprise clients.
✅ Fundraising & Business Operations:
Secured $750K in pre-seed funding through data-backed pitches & market validation.
Managed P&L, budgeting, hiring, and go-to-market execution.
Results & Impact
📈 Business Growth & Adoption:
Enrolled 200 Beta Users, 3 Universities, and 1 Enterprise Client in pilot programs.
Raised $750K+ in venture funding to scale operations.
Achieved a 30% demo conversion rate through optimized marketing & positioning.
📊 Product Success Metrics:
Reduced R&D development time by 35%, saving users $1M in costs.
Increased feature adoption & engagement through personalized AI-powered onboarding.
Optimized user sign-up rates by 50% via A/B testing and behavioral insights.
Key Learnings & Takeaways
🚀 End-to-End Product Leadership: Led all aspects of roadmapping, GTM strategy, and business development while ensuring user-centric execution.
📊 Data-Driven Decision Making: Used qualitative & quantitative insights to identify pain points, run A/B tests, and drive user engagement.
💰 Fundraising & Startup Growth: Developed investor pitches, managed lean operations, and balanced scalability vs. budget constraints.
